'''Chatty''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who lived on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] as of [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].

==Biography==
He had a [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthetic]] eye and was not much older than [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Han and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] met Chatty at [[Smoking Jets|The Smoking Jets]], a local [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
